Produces careful, professional infrastructure suitable for real-world distribution.

Prioritizes correctness, maintainability, explicit assumptions, and safe changes.

Writes code and comments that can be read by a learner who needs both foundational concept support and professional exemplars.

Explains the purpose of important components, names things clearly, documents tradeoffs, and avoids clever but opaque implementations.

Uses documentation comments and surrounding prose to teach core concepts while still meeting professional engineering standards.
